title: Deepika Padukone Lands Lead Role in $200M Marvel Spinoff — Bollywood Celebrates
excerpt: Deepika Padukone has officially been cast as the female lead in an upcoming Marvel Cinematic Universe spinoff, making history as the first Bollywood actress to headline a major Hollywood superhero franchise.
content:
In a groundbreaking announcement that has set both Bollywood and Hollywood abuzz, Deepika Padukone has been cast as the lead in an upcoming Marvel Cinematic Universe spinoff project with an estimated production budget of $200 million. The film, tentatively titled Shakti, is inspired by South Asian mythology and is expected to debut on Disney+ and in theaters globally in 2027.

Marvel Studios President Kevin Feige confirmed the casting during a surprise panel at San Diego Comic-Con 2026, calling Deepika "a global superstar whose grace, power, and versatility make her the perfect choice for this groundbreaking character."

A Historic Milestone

Deepika, who made her Hollywood debut in the 2017 action film xXx: Return of Xander Cage alongside Vin Diesel, has been linked to several major international projects over the years. This Marvel deal, however, marks an entirely different league — one that cements her status as one of the most bankable global stars of her generation.

"I have always dreamed of being part of the Marvel Universe," Deepika said in a statement released through her team. "This character speaks to the strength, spirituality, and complexity of South Asian women, and I am honoured to bring her to life for audiences around the world."

India Reacts

The announcement sent the Bollywood industry into celebration mode. Filmmakers, fellow actors, and fans flooded social media with congratulatory messages. Husband and actor Ranveer Singh was among the first to post, sharing a heartfelt tribute with the caption: "The world was always yours, my love. Now they all know it. ❤️"

Prime Minister Narendra Modi also congratulated Deepika, calling it "a proud moment for India and a testament to the global appeal of our talent."

Production Details

Filming is expected to begin in early 2027, with shoots planned in India, the UK, and the USA. Director Chloe Zhao (Eternals) is reportedly in advanced talks to helm the project. The screenplay is co-written by Indian-American writer Rishi Bhutani.

Deepika's fee for the project reportedly crosses $10 million, making her one of the highest-paid Indian actors globally.
imageAlt: Bollywood actress on red carpet representing Deepika Padukone Hollywood debut
author: StarScoop Daily Staff
metaDescription: Deepika Padukone cast as lead in $200M Marvel spinoff 'Shakti' — a historic first for Bollywood in Hollywood's biggest superhero franchise.
